items.title: Base Endurance Run
items.description: Run 8 km at a comfortable pace of 6:30 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Strength Training Session
items.description: Perform a full-body weight training session focusing on compound movements. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, deadlifts, and bench press with 60 seconds of rest between sets.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Warm up for 10 minutes, then perform 5x800m intervals at 5:30 min/km pace with 3 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 1 (below 130 bpm) to aid recovery.
